languages.text: "Вы не обижайтесь, Ваше Благородие, но раз на ногах стоите, то рано вам сюда заявляться".

traits.locale_text: "Вы не обижайтесь, Ваше Благородие, но раз на ногах стоите, то рано вам сюда заявляться".

languages.text: "No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."
languages.original_text: "Вы не обижайтесь, Ваше Благородие, но раз на ногах стоите, то рано вам сюда заявляться".

traits.locale_text: "No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."
"No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."
"No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."

languages.text: "Nichts für ungut, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}, aber wenn Ihr hier mit eigener Kraft hereinspaziert, kommt Ihr zu früh."
languages.original_text: "No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."

traits.locale_text: "Nichts für ungut, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}, aber wenn Ihr hier mit eigener Kraft hereinspaziert, kommt Ihr zu früh."

languages.text: “无意冒犯，大人，但您既然还能自己走进来，那就说明来得还太早了。”
languages.original_text: "No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."

traits.locale_text: “无意冒犯，大人，但您既然还能自己走进来，那就说明来得还太早了。”

languages.text: « Sauf votre respect, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}, si vous comptez procéder {mf|seul|seule}, il est trop tôt. »
languages.original_text: "No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."

traits.locale_text: « Sauf votre respect, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}, si vous comptez procéder {mf|seul|seule}, il est trop tôt. »

languages.text: «No se ofenda, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero si ha entrado aquí por su propio pie, es que viene demasiado pronto».
languages.original_text: "No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."

traits.locale_text: «No se ofenda, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero si ha entrado aquí por su propio pie, es que viene demasiado pronto».

languages.text: "Yanlış anlamayın {mf|lordum|leydim} ama buraya kendi başınıza yürüyerek geliyorsanız fazla erkencisiniz."
languages.original_text: "No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."

traits.locale_text: "Yanlış anlamayın {mf|lordum|leydim} ama buraya kendi başınıza yürüyerek geliyorsanız fazla erkencisiniz."

languages.text: 「悪意はありませんが、殿、もしご自身の力でここへ歩いているのなら、まだ早いですよ」
languages.original_text: "No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."

traits.locale_text: 「悪意はありませんが、殿、もしご自身の力でここへ歩いているのなら、まだ早いですよ」
